query.description: The original research query submitted by the user.

depth.description: Research depth level used: quick, standard, or deep.

tokens_used.description: Total LLM tokens consumed during the research run.

report.description: Structured intelligence report containing executive_summary, key_findings, market_landscape, opportunities, risks, recommendations, sources, and raw_analysis.

markdown_report.description: Formatted Markdown version of the report (only present when outputFormat=markdown).
